task: Enhance OpenClaw capability for complex global market analysis and investment strategy queries

governance_bootstrap.summary: Production changes via git commit/push to origin/main + deploy_to_macmini.sh
Single source of truth is origin/main; direct Mac Mini modification prohibited

root_causes: TOOL_KEYWORDS lacked market/finance terms ('증시', '시황', '거시경제', '글로벌 증시'), preventing web search tool trigger for general market queries
_maybe_inject_trading_context over-emphasized internal Turtle Trading positions (ASX, META), overriding general global macro market syntheses
_prefer_gemini_openclaw returned True due to claude CLI stdin timeout in _is_provider_available, blocking Tier2 tool agent

changes.description: Added '증시', '시황', '글로벌 증시', '주식 시장', '거시경제', '마켓', '나스닥', 's&p500' to TOOL_KEYWORDS & regexes to enable tool/search routing. Disambiguated global macro queries from internal position reports in _maybe_inject_trading_context instructions. Fixed _prefer_gemini_openclaw to check ANTHROPIC_API_KEY first.
Fixed _is_provider_available for claude CLI to use stdin=DEVNULL to prevent 3s stdin wait timeout

verification.name: openclaw_agent.py:run entrypoint market query routing test
verification.command: .venv/bin/python3 -c 'from adapters.content.openclaw_agent import _needs_tools; print(_needs_tools("현재 글로벌 증시 시황과 향후 투자 전략에 대해 알려줘."))'
verification.result: _needs_tools returned True on macmini api environment — market queries trigger tool agent and web search routing instead of falling back to default chat

deploy.method: git commit + push to origin/main, then scripts/deploy_to_macmini.sh
